name: Travis Scott
bio: Travis Scott built a streaming-scale rap catalog with blockbuster singles, playlist reach, and brand-linked visibility beyond the music itself.
notable_for: High-scale streaming, festival-era hit catalog, and strong brand amplification.
career_highlight: SICKO MODE became one of the defining rap streaming hits of its era and continues to anchor catalog value.
revenue_drivers: Billions of streams keep the top catalog performing at global rap scale.
Large playlist footprint extends the life of key singles.
Brand visibility and collaboration networks reinforce catalog reach.
